project_identity.name: WTF Agency Proposal System
project_identity.description: A single-page, dynamic proposal presentation system designed to close 6-figure deals. It replaces the boring PDF with an immersive, interactive digital experience.
project_identity.emotional_archetype: Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5) mixed with Swiss Precision

typography.installation: Import via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400&display=swap');

ProposalHeader.style: Fixed top, glassmorphism. Left: 'WTF Agency' logo (text). Right: Client Name (faded) + Contact Button.
ProposalHeader.interaction: Fade in on load. Stays transparent until scroll, then adds glass blur.

HeroSection.style: Full viewport height (h-screen). Background image with heavy dark overlay. Centered massive typography.
HeroSection.motion: Parallax background. Text staggers in from bottom.

PricingTable.style: 3-column grid. Cards are dark gray (#0F0F0F) with 1px border. 'Recommended' tier is scaled 1.05x with a glowing border in client accent color.
PricingTable.features: List items with check icons. Price is massive display text.
PricingTable.interaction: Hover: Card lifts -10px, border glows brighter. Non-hovered cards fade slightly (opacity 0.5).

Timeline.style: Vertical center line. Nodes alternate left/right. Content glass cards.
Timeline.interaction: Scroll triggers the line drawing (SVG path animation). Nodes pop in when in view.

ContactSection.style: Minimalist. Large 'Ready to Proceed?' text. Two buttons: 'Accept Proposal' (Solid Accent) vs 'Discuss' (Outline).

ErrorPage.style: Simple, dark, centered. '404: Client Not Found'. Button to return home (or demo).

wine_hero.alt: Luxury Wine Bottle in Dark Vineyard

assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Examples: Check, ArrowRight, X, Menu, DollarSign, Calendar.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge'.
2. SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors and fonts.
3. FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
4. ROUTING: Use react-router-dom. Create a layout that reads the ':clientId' param.
5. DATA: Create the mock JSON data first in src/data/proposals.json.
6. COMPONENTS: Build components using the 'glass' utility class for backgrounds. Do not use solid white backgrounds.
7. DEBUG: If an image fails to load, have a fallback solid color background based on the client accent.
8. CRITICAL: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.

universal_guidelines.no_gradients_text: Do not use gradient text on dark backgrounds unless it is very subtle.
universal_guidelines.contrast: Ensure text is #FAFAFA (zinc-50) or #A1A1AA (zinc-400). Never use #555 on black.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use py-24 for section spacing. Don't cram content.
